title: getv1healthreturnsuccesswhenapirunninganddbhealthy
description: Verify that a GET request to /v1/health returns a 200 SuccessResponse indicating the API service and database connection are healthy.

title: getv1healthreturnserrorwhendatabaseunavailable
description: Verify that a GET request to /v1/health returns a non-200 error response when the database is unavailable, indicating service health check failure.

title: postv1authsignupcreatesaccountwithvaliddata
description: Verify that a POST request to /v1/auth/signup with valid patient or provider registration data returns a 200 SuccessResponse and creates a new user account.

title: postv1authsignupreturnsvalidationerrorwithinvaliddata
description: Verify that a POST request to /v1/auth/signup with missing or invalid required fields returns a validation error response and does not create an account.

title: postv1authloginreturnssuccesswithvalidcredentials
description: Verify that a POST request to /v1/auth/login with valid email and password returns a 200 SuccessResponse with authenticated session details.

title: postv1authloginreturnserrorwithinvalidcredentials
description: Verify that a POST request to /v1/auth/login with invalid credentials returns an authentication error response and no session is issued.

title: getv1providerpendingrequestsreturnsdatawithvalidtoken
description: Verify that after successful provider login, a GET request to /v1/provider/pending-requests with a valid auth token returns a 200 SuccessResponse containing pending provider requests.

title: getv1providerpendingrequestsdeniesaccesswithoutauthentication
description: Verify that a GET request to /v1/provider/pending-requests without authentication returns an authorization error response and no request data.

title: getv1providerpendingrequestsdeniesaccesswithinvalidtoken
description: Verify that a GET request to /v1/provider/pending-requests with an expired or invalid token returns a 401 or 403 error response and access is denied.
